# Package Management {.unnumbered}

Functions to:

1. install packages 
2. load packages
3. unload packages
3. update packages
4. delete packages

Use the [`annotater`](https://annotater.liomys.mx/) to annotate package load calls with version numbers, description, functions used.

Use `session_info()` to see what's loaded, as well as other information* (should session_info come elsewhere? documentation maybe?)
